hero.ctaDesc: 3D printing, CNC machines, benchwork zone, soldering and electronics

tech.title: Technologies
tech.subtitle: Professional equipment for solving real engineering problems

bento.equipDesc: Get access to a fleet of modern 3D printers. From basic PLA to complex engineering plastics — everything is booked online.
bento.processDesc: No more paper logbooks. Interactive schedule, access control, and automated notifications.

cta.desc: FabLab is more than just machines. It is a place where you can build a team, secure a grant, and launch a real business right inside the university.

atmosphere.title: Atmosphere
atmosphere.subtitle: A workspace where the future is created with your own hands

whyUs.title: Why Us
whyUs.safetyDesc: Mandatory briefing and tests. Access to complex equipment is granted only after passing safety protocols.
whyUs.precisionDesc: Industrial CNC machines, laser cutters, and calibrated 3D printers for perfect tolerances.
whyUs.communityDesc: Work side by side with the university's brightest minds. Exchange experience and create collaborations.
whyUs.mentorDesc: Lab engineers are always ready to advise on material selection and model optimization.
whyUs.showcaseDesc: Publish your ideas, attract investors, and find missing specialists for your team.
whyUs.locationDesc: The laboratory is located right in the heart of the Satbayev University campus.

footer.desc: Your ideas. Our equipment. The launchpad for startups.

sdg.title: Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs)
sdg.subtitle: FabLab Satbayev actively supports the university's global strategy within the framework of UN initiatives

goal4.title: Quality Education
goal4.desc: We provide open access to digital manufacturing. We train students in practical engineering, prototyping, and operating industrial equipment.

goal7.title: Affordable & Clean Energy
goal7.desc: We stimulate the development of student projects in the GreenTech field. We help build prototypes of energy-efficient systems and renewable energy sources.

goal9.title: Industry & Innovation
goal9.desc: We develop a reliable hardware infrastructure for startups. We help transform theoretical ideas into market-ready technological products.

booking_dialog.warningMentor: High-risk machine. Only duty mentor working hours are available. Application is submitted for manual confirmation.

errors.alreadyBusy: This time slot is already taken! Please refresh the page.
errors.noPermission: You do not have permission to perform this action

login.subtitle: Sign in or register to continue.

validation.passwordSpecial: Password must contain a special character

errorBoundary.title: Oops! Something went wrong. We're fixing it.

reset.title: Reset Password
reset.subtitle: Enter your email, and we will send you a reset link.

creators.heading: We are Amira & Rasul
creators.p2: Our goal is to develop convenient booking systems and digital solutions for various fields. We study how users interact with services and build tools that make the process simple, fast, and intuitive.
creators.p3_middle: booking system is one example of our work. The project started as a student initiative during our studies at
creators.p3_end: and eventually evolved into a full-fledged product.
creators.p4: is an independent project entirely conceived and developed by our team.
